claims.summary: Structurally similar but semantically different texts can collide in the deterministic codec.
claims.disposition: verify semantic-projection and spectral-collision regressions preserve meaningful distinction

claims.summary: A narrative shift near the 75 percent mark should not be lost by a simple half-versus-half feature.
claims.disposition: verify four-point narrative arcs, curvature, dynamics, and late-pivot regressions

claims.summary: High-entropy vibrancy should be bounded when structural substance is weak.
claims.disposition: verify current bounded high-entropy noise damping, authority fields, and no live control write

claims.summary: Projected semantics should be weighted by warmth and tension or receive stronger dynamic vibrancy damping.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes live codec weighting and semantic gain
